database.name: VIEW SSTPC_MAT_PROJ_VOID_V
database.view: SELECT get_uuid() AS sstpc_mat_proj_void_v_id, to_number(row_number() OVER (ORDER BY rep.centro_costos)) AS row_numb, rep.ad_org_id, rep.ad_client_id, rep.isactive, rep.created, rep.createdby, rep.updated, rep.updatedby, rep.albaran, rep.unidad_medida, rep.c_costcenter_id, rep.centro_costos, rep.cantidad, rep.costo, rep.codigo, rep.m_product_id, rep.producto, rep.total_linea, rep.fecha_actual, rep.liquidado, rep.movementdate, rep.c_bpartner_id, rep.m_warehouse_id, rep.ad_user_id, rep.m_inoutline_id, rep.c_doctype_id, rep.linea_albaran, rep.c_uom_id, rep.costo_total, rep.docstatus FROM (SELECT get_uuid() AS sstcp_mat_con_proj_v_id, mi.ad_org_id, mi.ad_client_id, to_char('Y') AS isactive, mi.created, mi.createdby, mi.updated, mi.updatedby, mi.documentno AS albaran, uom.name AS unidad_medida, cc.c_costcenter_id, cc.name AS centro_costos, mil.movementqty AS cantidad, COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0)) / mil.movementqty AS costo, COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0)) AS costo_total, mp.value AS codigo, mp.m_product_id, mp.name AS producto, COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0)) AS total_linea, to_char(now(), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS fecha_actual, to_char(mil.em_sstpc_isliquidated) AS liquidado, mi.movementdate, cbp.c_bpartner_id, mw.name AS bodega, mi.m_warehouse_id, au.ad_user_id, mil.m_inoutline_id, cd.c_doctype_id, mil.line AS linea_albaran, uom.c_uom_id, mi.docstatus FROM m_inout mi LEFT JOIN m_inoutline mil ON mil.m_inout_id = mi.m_inout_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mil.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN c_costcenter cc ON cc.c_costcenter_id = mi.c_costcenter_id LEFT JOIN m_transaction mt ON mt.m_inoutline_id = mil.m_inoutline_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype cd ON cd.c_doctype_id = mi.c_doctype_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cbp ON cbp.c_bpartner_id = mi.c_bpartner_id LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = mi.m_warehouse_id LEFT JOIN ad_user au ON au.ad_user_id = mi.createdby WHERE cc.c_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL AND (mi.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y' OR mil.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y') AND (mi.docstatus = 'CO' OR mi.docstatus = 'VO') AND mi.posted = 'Y' AND mi.issotrx = 'Y' AND cd.isreturn = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT get_uuid() AS sstcp_mat_con_proj_v, mi.ad_org_id, mi.ad_client_id, to_char('Y') AS isactive, mi.created, mi.createdby, mi.updated, mi.updatedby, mi.documentno AS albaran, uom.name AS unidad_medida, cc.c_costcenter_id, cc.name AS centro_costos, abs(mil.movementqty) * (-1) AS cantidad, (-1) * abs(COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0))) / abs(mil.movementqty) * (-1) AS costo, (-1) * abs(COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0))) AS costo_total, mp.value AS codigo, mp.m_product_id, mp.name AS producto, abs(COALESCE(to_number(mt.transactioncost), to_number(0))) AS total_linea, to_char(now(), 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS fecha_actual, mil.em_sstpc_isliquidated, mi.movementdate, cbp.c_bpartner_id AS tercero, mw.name AS bodega, mi.m_warehouse_id, au.ad_user_id, mil.m_inoutline_id, cd.c_doctype_id, mil.line AS linea_albaran, uom.c_uom_id, mi.docstatus FROM m_inout mi LEFT JOIN m_inoutline mil ON mil.m_inout_id = mi.m_inout_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype cd ON cd.c_doctype_id = mi.c_doctype_id LEFT JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = mil.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_uom uom ON uom.c_uom_id = mp.c_uom_id LEFT JOIN c_costcenter cc ON cc.c_costcenter_id = mi.c_costcenter_id LEFT JOIN m_transaction mt ON mt.m_inoutline_id = mil.m_inoutline_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cbp ON cbp.c_bpartner_id = mi.c_bpartner_id LEFT JOIN m_warehouse mw ON mw.m_warehouse_id = mi.m_warehouse_id LEFT JOIN ad_user au ON au.ad_user_id = mi.createdby WHERE (mi.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y' OR mil.em_sstpc_isconsworkp = 'Y') AND (mi.docstatus = 'CO' OR mi.docstatus = 'VO') AND cd.isreturn = 'Y' AND mi.issotrx = 'Y' AND cc.c_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL AND mi.posted = 'Y') rep
